name: Gulai Kambing (Spiced Lamb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb into bite-size chunks.
2. Chop the onions, chiles, ginger, lemon root, and lemon grass.
3. Crush the garlic and grind the macadamia nuts.
4. Skin the tomatoes and cut the flesh into small dice.
5. Heat the oil in a large pan, add the onion, chiles, and garlic, and sauté until the onion becomes translucent.
6. Add the lamb, ginger, lemon root, lemon grass, and tomato to the pan; cook for another three minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add the spice powders, cinnamon stick, and cloves; season with salt and pepper.
8. Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
9. Lower the heat and allow the dish to simmer until the meat is very tender (approximately 45 minutes).
10. Serve immediately with steamed rice.
